name_en: 🔥 New Woven Handle 🔥 The mini soft calfskin Puzzle bag is the first handbag created by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson 👜 The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines 🎀 This small size version is made of soft calfskin 🧸 paired with a unique woven handle. * This small Puzzle bag can hold, for example, a large wallet 👛 all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 It can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, carried by hand, or held as a clutch 😻 Removable adjustable shoulder strap * Zipper closure 🖤 Calfskin zipper head 🔗 An external zippered back pocket and an internal slip pocket * Can be customized with the shoulder strap and personalized charms * Suede lining * Anagram embossing 🛍️
name_cn:
🔥 New Woven Handle 🔥 The mini soft calfskin Puzzle bag is the first handbag created by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson 👜 The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines 🎀 This small size version is made of soft calfskin 🧸 paired with a unique woven handle. * This small Puzzle bag can hold, for example, a large wallet 👛 all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 It can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, carried by hand, or held as a clutch 😻 Removable adjustable shoulder strap * Zipper closure 🖤 Calfskin zipper head 🔗 An external zippered back pocket and an internal slip pocket * Can be customized with the shoulder strap and personalized charms * Suede lining * Anagram embossing 🛍️
Size: 18cm~12.5cm~8cm
Style No.: 9097
